channel.title: Radiochimica Acta
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Radiochimica Acta

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Maryam Al Huwayz, Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, F.F. Alharbi, M.I. Sayyed, B. Albarzan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2025-frontmatter2

item.title: Excitation functions of proton-induced nuclear reactions on titanium
item.description: Article by Maryam Al Huwayz, Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, F.F. Alharbi, M.I. Sayyed, B. Albarzan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0347

item.title: Neptunium(V) N,N′-dicyanoguanidinate complexes with electroneutral N-donor ligands
item.description: Article by Maryam Al Huwayz, Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, F.F. Alharbi, M.I. Sayyed, B. Albarzan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0283

item.title: Combining synergistic interaction and ion imprinting to improve adsorption capacity for selective uranium extraction from seawater
item.description: Article by Maryam Al Huwayz, Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, F.F. Alharbi, M.I. Sayyed, B. Albarzan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0321

item.title: Influence of the gamma source on the radiolytic stability of N,N,N′,N′-tetra-n-octyl-diglycolamide (TODGA)
item.description: Article by Maryam Al Huwayz, Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, F.F. Alharbi, M.I. Sayyed, B. Albarzan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0329

item.title: Partial purification and characterization of Echinococcusgranulosus antigen 5, extracted from hydatid cyst: Radiolabeling study with Iodine 125
item.description: Article by Maryam Al Huwayz, Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, F.F. Alharbi, M.I. Sayyed, B. Albarzan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0332

item.title: Development of technetium-99m (99mTc) labeled carbon from palm kernel shell as lung scintigraphy agent
item.description: Article by Maryam Al Huwayz, Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, F.F. Alharbi, M.I. Sayyed, B. Albarzan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0308

item.title: Radiotoxic elements of 210Pb and 210Po inhalation dose calculation in tobacco smokes
item.description: Article by Maryam Al Huwayz, Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, F.F. Alharbi, M.I. Sayyed, B. Albarzan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0330

item.title: Investigation of the radiation shielding efficiency of Bi2O3-doped borosilicate glasses
item.description: Article by Maryam Al Huwayz, Aljawhara H. Almuqrin, F.F. Alharbi, M.I. Sayyed, B. Albarzan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ract-2024-0348
